ops.title: On-path inline-lossless fast-lane (L2 cleans fresh tail)
ops.description: L2 applies D→E→A composition on-path to this turn's provably-uncached tail (segment message indices ≥ last turn's message count), pin-exempt ToolPair leaf extraction, session-scoped commitment set (re-render every turn incl. Hold), staged precedence, FAST_LANE_MAX_LEAF=256KiB, commit only after splice_and_gate succeeds, inside catch_unwind + 50ms. Byte-stability is THE invariant: eligibility pure over (committed set, message-count window, staged map). Two surfaced v1 cuts get code comments + follow-up tasks at landing: post_squash_below_floor blind to fast-lane removals; in-memory commitment set restart regression. Plan: two-notes-shimmying-zephyr Phase 4; fable-lane implementation.

ops.text: fast_lane_* proxy tests green incl. staged precedence, Hold splice, commit-on-splice-only, pinned-current-tool-result
live session: fast-lane per-turn log present and realized-bust breaker stays engaged
